name: Car Machines
author: Poki
description: Car Machines is the ultimate test of your driving and building skills! Customize your dream car with powerful parts and epic upgrades, then take on thrilling challenges across wild biomes—from blazing deserts to icy tundras. Race solo to push your limits or go head-to-head with others in multiplayer mode. Build, race, and conquer the terrain—are you ready for the challenge? How to play Car Machines? Speed Up: W or the up arrow key Brake: S or the down arrow key Position Your Motorbike: Use the A and D or left and right arrow keys to perform front flips and backflips Who created Car Machines? Car Machines is created by emolingo games. Play their other games on Poki: Sword Masters , Escape From School , Disaster Arena and Rainbow Obby ! How can I play Car Machines for free? You can play Car Machines for free on Poki. Can I play Car Machines on mobile devices and desktop? Car Machines can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Car Machines with my friend? Yes! Car Machines is a single or multiplayer game so you can play with your friend online!
